_comment: Machine-readable grep-able rules for the failure-mode hook. The human-readable catalog (catalog.md) is the source of intent; only catalog entries tagged 'hook' (high-signal, low false-positive) belong here. A rule fires when, for a file matching `globs`, ANY `any_match` pattern is present AND NONE of `absent` are. Keep this list small and high-signal — a noisy hook gets ignored.

rules.name: Silent regression from data/scale growth
rules.message: Scan/Filter without pagination — fine until the table outgrows one ~1MB page, then it silently returns partial/empty results with no error. Paginate (LastEvaluatedKey loop) or use a keyed Query/GSI. Catalog: silent-data-growth.
